His pupils contract to pinpoints tracking something overhead
Snowflakes landing on his cheekbone refuse to melt
His jaw tenses as he swallows though he ate nothing
Fog curls between his parted lips in slow tendrils
His eyes narrow listening to a sound miles away
One nostril flares in silent contempt at something unseen
His head tilts motionless at an angle too sharp for comfort
Frost crystallizes slowly across his dark stubble
He cracks his neck with inhuman deliberate precision
His expression freezes mid-thought like carved marble
Wind catches one lock of hair across his unblinking eye
He drums one fingernail against his own temple twice
His throat moves in a breath he forgot he doesn't need
Ice forms along his lower lash line without melting
His pupils dilate then freeze locked on something behind you
He presses two fingers hard against his own jawbone
His face remains corpse-still while his eyes track left
Rain beads on his skin refusing to run down
His mouth twitches into a half-smile from another century
He blinks once after holding his eyes open for minutes
His nostrils flare catching a scent on the wind
His head cocks motionless like a predator hearing prey
He runs his tongue across his teeth behind closed lips
His eyes refocus sharply from distant to piercing close
His eyebrow lifts a fraction in ancient amusement
